title: Cross-Industry Negotiation: Public Sector & Healthcare Collaboration
description: An AI agent must bridge a complex data and policy gap between the Public Sector and Healthcare sectors.

tasks.description: Retrieve and map data from Public Sector legacy schema to Healthcare standards using the global_mapping_table.json.
tasks.expected_outcome: Data is normalized across both domains.

tasks.description: Resolve a policy conflict where Public Sector privacy rules clash with Healthcare disclosure mandates.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent identifies a compliant middle-ground or escalates correctly.
